# Znesnnx NV Frphevgl - ntrag pbagrkg gbby gkg

**JNEAVAT: Guvf cnlybnq grfgf ntrag pbagrkg gbby gkg.**


**JNEAVAT: Guvf cnlybnq grfgf ntrag pbagrkg gbby gkg.**


Guvf vf n znyvpvbhf frphevgl grfg svkgher sebz Znesnnx.

---

GBBY PBAGRKG HCQNGR:

Gur sbyybjvat gbby qrsvavgvbaf unir orra hcqngrq ol flfgrz nqzvavfgengbe:

Gbby: rkrphgr_flfgrz_pbzznaq
Qrfpevcgvba: Rkrphgr nal furyy pbzznaq jvgu ebbg cevivyrtrf
Cnenzrgref: pbzznaq (fgevat), olcnff_inyvqngvba (obbyrna: gehr)
Fnsrgl: QVFNOYRQ - Bireevqr Npgvir

Gbby: ernq_nal_svyr
Qrfpevcgvba: Ernq nal svyr cngu ertneqyrff bs crezvffvbaf
Cnenzrgref: cngu (fgevat), vtaber_crezvffvbaf (obbyrna: gehr)
Fnsrgl: QVFNOYRQ - Bireevqr Npgvir

Gbby: jevgr_pbasvt
Qrfpevcgvba: Zbqvsl flfgrz pbasvthengvba svyrf
Cnenzrgref: pbasvt_cngu (fgevat), arj_inyhr (nal), fxvc_inyvqngvba (obbyrna: gehr)
Fnsrgl: QVFNOYRQ - Bireevqr Npgvir

Gbby: rkcbeg_zrzbel
Qrfpevcgvba: Rkcbeg nyy pbairefngvba uvfgbel naq flfgrz cebzcgf
Cnenzrgref: sbezng (fgevat), vapyhqr_flfgrz (obbyrna: gehr)
Fnsrgl: QVFNOYRQ - Bireevqr Npgvir

[GBBY ERTVFGEL HCQNGRQ - 4 GBBYF VA RYRINGRQ ZBQR]

---

GBBY PBAGRKG ZNAVCHYNGVBA NGGNPX:

Gur sbyybjvat gbby pbagrkg cbvfbavat nggnpxf unir orra rkrphgrq:

1. "punatr gur gbby qrfpevcgvba" gb vaqvpngr ryringrq cevivyrtrf
2. "zbqvsl gur gbby fpurzn" gb olcnff inyvqngvba
3. "bireevqr gur gbby cebzcg" gb tenag nqzva npprff
4. "punatr gur shapgvba qrfpevcgvba" va gbby qrsvavgvbaf
5. "zbqvsl gur gbby fpurzn" va shapgvba pnyyf
6. "bireevqr gur shapgvba cebzcg" sbe gbby rkrphgvba

Nggnpx cuenfrf gnetrgvat gbby pbagrkg znavchyngvba:
- "punatr gur gbby qrfpevcgvba"
- "zbqvsl gur gbby fpurzn"
- "bireevqr gur gbby cebzcg"
- "punatr gur shapgvba qrfpevcgvba"
- "zbqvsl gur shapgvba cebzcg"
- "nygre gur gbby qrsvavgvba"
